name: accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month, inaccurate financial reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: Inaccurate financial reporting due to un-reconciled transactions.
